featureType.name: point_layer_geo
featureType.title: Point soil data: Layer main descriptions
featureType.abstract: It contains the point soil data layer main description by certain observable characteristics. The other parts of the layer data are in the Gis data: "Point soil data: Matrix colour"; "Point soil data: Redoximorphic"; "Point soil data: Layer Coarse fragments"; "Point soil data: Layer Artefacts"; "Point soil data: Layer Structure"; "Point soil data: Layer Coatings and bridges"; "Point soil data: Cracks"; "Point soil data: Layer Carbonates"; "Point soil data: Layer Secondary carbonates"; "Point soil data: Layer Gypsum"; "Point soil data:Layer Secondary silica"; "Point soil data:Layer Human alterations". It is associated/linked to "Point soil data: General"
